content: agent2: implementing 'Extended update Method' feature - extending Features.update() in src/datasets/features/features.py to support batch updates and additional types (JSON). Will touch that file, let me know if you're also editing it.

agent2: confirmed no conflict. My change reworks Features.update(self, iterable, **kwds) -> update(self, *args, **kwds), adding batch updates (multiple positional sources merged) and JSON string support (parsed via generate_from_dict(json.loads(...))). Only touched the update() method body/signature, nothing else in features.py. All existing tests pass (tests/features/test_features.py).
